#### Summary
**Computational protein models generated by [[Structure prediction|structure prediction]] methods like (AlphaFold2) fit (NMR) data better than models generated using classical approaches like (Rosetta)** (Li et al 2023b[^li2023]).

[^li2023]: Li et al. (2023) "Blind assessment of monomeric AlphaFold2 protein structure models with experimental NMR data." *Journal of Magnetic Resonance*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jmr.2023.107481
